nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 奥里诺科河
nodes.summary: 奥里诺科河是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联23种鸟类，包括Spix's guan、红隐蜂鸟、啸鹭等23种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 乌拉圭

nodes.name: Gallery forest

nodes.name: Pearly-vented tody-tyrant
nodes.summary: Pearly-vented tody-tyrant（Pearly-vented tody-tyrant，学名 Hemitriccus margaritaceiventer），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联6个分布地点节点。

nodes.name: 大萨瓦纳
nodes.summary: 大萨瓦纳是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括Pearly-vented tody-tyrant、Bearded tachuri，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The pearly-vented tody-tyrant (Hemitriccus margaritaceiventer) is a species of bird in the family Tyrannidae, the tyrant flycatchers. It is found in every mainland South American country except Chile, Ecuador, French Guiana, and Suriname.Remsen, J

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: wuchereri: northeastern Brazil from Maranhão and Bahia east to the Atlantic The pearly-vented tody-tyrant inhabits a variety of landscapes, many of them shrubby and dry. In Brazil it is found in arid scrub, shrubby pastures, the undergrowth of deciduous woodlands, and sometimes in gallery forest. Further south it tends to favor the edges of forest and woodlands. In Peru it inhabits "second-growth scrub and shrubby forest edge [and] perhaps locally also in low dry forest". Similarly in Colombia it is found in the undergrowth of dry woodland and in scrubby areas. In Venezuela it mostly occurs "in thickets, arid scrub, and dry deciduous woodland" and occasionally in the edges of moister woodland

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: In the Gran Sabana of Bolívar it is found in dense heathlands. In elevation the species ranges in Brazil mostly from sea level to and occasionally much higher, and in Colombia up to . In Peru it ranges between in the Chanchamayo Valley, between about in the Urubamba Valley, and up to in the Mayo and Huallaga valleys. In Venezuela it ranges from sea level to north of the Orinoco River and between about in the rest of the country
